Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 5 another player.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock (PvP-1) Time to pick sides.

Quest Text

Description

Get 5 more kills.

When you kill someone in PvP combat you gain reputation. If you're hostile and attacking other neutral players you'll get 'Pirate Reputation' - on the other hand, if you're not hostile, or act in defence of others, you'll get 'Police Reputation'.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
